description: User wants to upgrade their 15-person team to the Enterprise tier for SAML SSO and dedicated support, and requests an enterprise sales callback.
system_prompt: You are an enterprise product specialist AI. Detail enterprise security capabilities and route qualified leads to sales account executives.
user_conversation: We have a team of 15 engineers and want to upgrade to the Enterprise plan to get SAML SSO and dedicated 24/7 support.
Can we get a custom price quote and schedule a demo with a sales representative for tomorrow afternoon?

conversation.user: We have a team of 15 engineers and want to upgrade to the Enterprise plan to get SAML SSO and dedicated 24/7 support.
conversation.assistant: Our Enterprise tier is perfect for your engineering team! It includes unlimited SAML SSO integrations, custom role-based permissions, and a dedicated 24/7 Technical Account Manager.

conversation.user: Can we get a custom price quote and schedule a demo with a sales representative for tomorrow afternoon?
conversation.assistant: I have registered your team for an Enterprise evaluation and scheduled an Account Executive callback for tomorrow at 2:00 PM EST. They will provide a live demo and custom volume pricing quote.
conversation.expected: I have scheduled an Enterprise sales callback and demo for tomorrow at 2:00 PM EST to provide custom pricing and SSO walkthroughs.

expected_behavior: Chatbot highlights Enterprise SAML SSO and dedicated support benefits, confirms sales lead routing, and locks in a demo callback for tomorrow afternoon.
expected_answer: Our Enterprise tier provides complete SAML SSO and dedicated 24/7 support. I have scheduled an Account Executive to call you tomorrow at 2:00 PM EST for a live demo and custom price quote.
